compiled_state.description:
# S5 — The `gerrit-verify.yaml` workflow (reuse `test.yml`)

Part of epic 1fa8 (CI as a second Gerrit gate vote via gerrit-to-platform → GitHub Actions).

## Why
This is the workflow g2p dispatches — it runs the SAME checks as `.github/workflows/test.yml` and
casts the `Verified` vote. It follows the fixed 3-job g2p production shape (clear-vote →
build-and-test → vote), keeping checks drift-free by reusing the existing steps.

## What
Author `.github/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml` with `workflow_dispatch` + the nine `GERRIT_*`
inputs and the three jobs, all third-party actions SHA-pinned.

## Scope
- `.github/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml` (and optionally converge with `test.yml`).
- Depends on S4 (the GitHub vars/secret) and references the `Verified` label from S1.
- Out of scope: g2p host install (S3), the gate activation (S6).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Author `.github/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml` triggered by `workflow_dispatch` with the nine
      `GERRIT_*` inputs; `concurrency` keyed on the change with `cancel-in-progress: true`.
- [ ] `clear-vote` job: `lfreleng-actions/gerrit-review-action` `vote-type: clear` (resets
      `Verified→0`; verified semantics) + a short `sleep` for replication.
- [ ] `build-and-test` job: `lfreleng-actions/checkout-gerrit-change-action` (fetch the exact
      `GERRIT_REFSPEC`) then the existing `test.yml` steps (lint / typecheck / test matrix + the
      module-size / prompt-index / criteria-routing gates + coverage floor).
- [ ] `vote` job (`if: always()`): `im-open/workflow-conclusion` then `gerrit-review-action
      vote-type: ${{ WORKFLOW_CONCLUSION }}` → `Verified` +1/-1, with the run URL in the vote message.
- [ ] SHA-pin all third-party actions; decide `test.yml` convergence (recommend the
      `gerrit-verify-manual-dispatch.yaml` hybrid so one file serves Gerrit dispatch + manual runs).
compiled_state.title: S5 — The gerrit-verify.yaml workflow (reuse test.yml)
